Here are the findings:

**Haiku is routed through the Anthropic SDK**, not the CLI. The logic is in `/mnt/data/clunger/src/services/congress.ts`:

- `SDK_MODELS` (line 191) contains only `"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001"` — when `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` is set and the model matches, it uses `client.messages.stream()` via the SDK directly.
- All other Claude models (opus, sonnet) fall back to `callClaudeCli()` which spawns `claude -p` as a child process.
